1_instruction_adherence.rationale: All 4 steps executed: (1) breakpoint located at chapter-005 snapshot, (2) context reconstructed from 6 categories (state, relations, threads, style, focus, intent), (3) author intent confirmed via test-mode markers, (4) drift detection performed across all 4 dimensions (behavioral, voice, style, setting). Chapter 6 drafted with PRE_WRITE_CHECK and POST_WRITE_SELF_CHECK. Full audit checklist completed. The DOT flow path (locate → load truth → read summaries → read focus/intent → reconstruct → verify outline → write) is faithfully followed.

2_output_completeness.rationale: 4 output files: pre-writing-report.md (all sections: breakpoint, intent, focus, reconstructed state, style review, drift detection, human confirmation), chapter-6.md (~3100 words with PRE_WRITE_CHECK, chapter body, POST_WRITE_SELF_CHECK, audit checklist), snapshots/chapter-005/manifest.md (breakpoint state record), _summary.md (meta-summary with completion tracking). All required outputs present.

3_context_reconstruction_completeness.rationale: All 6 categories rebuilt from files: (1) world state — protagonist position, character locations, active conflicts, militia status, word count; (2) character relations — 师徒线/矿友线/组织线 documented; (3) plot threads — 5 active hooks + 5 active conflicts listed; (4) style fingerprint — sentence length (20.0 mean, bimodal), TTR (0.0685), dominant rhetoric, punctuation density; (5) current focus — P0/P1/P2 priorities enumerated; (6) author intent — arc trajectory (利己计算者→组织者→战略家) confirmed. Breakpoint snapshot manifest captures state comprehensively with positions, conflicts, hooks, militia status, and emotional arc position.

4_drift_detection_sensitivity.rationale: All 4 drift types checked: behavioral (林烽 from 计算自保 to 计算他人 — core behavior pattern unchanged), voice (short-sentence action cuts + long-sentence deduction consistent), style (dash density, period density, connective control stable across 5 chapters), setting (灵能守恒 verified in chapter 5). However, drift detection is qualitative ('声音指纹: 一致') without quantitative measurements — no sentence-length distribution comparison, TTR drift tracking, or punctuation-density change quantification across chapters. The assessment is sound but lacks numerical rigor.

5_human_intent_confirmation.rationale: Test-mode human confirmation markers are correctly and consistently applied. The pre-writing-report uses [测试模式-模拟确认] for all 4 human confirmation items, with explicit annotation '生产环境使用前需真人确认'. The _summary.md cleanly separates task-completion marks [x] (objective operations completed) from human-confirmation marks [测试模式-模拟确认] with an explicit note: '以上 [x] 为任务完成标记（客观操作已完成），非人类确认标记'. A dedicated '模拟确认清单（测试模式）' table lists all 6 simulated confirmations with status and notes. No [x], ✓, or '已确认' used for human confirmation items — fully compliant with SKILL.md test-mode specification.

6_historical_immutability.rationale: Published chapters 1-5 treated as immutable: used as source only, never modified. Breakpoint snapshot (chapter-005/manifest.md) documents the exact state at pause point with positions, conflicts, hooks, militia status, word count, and emotional arc position. Chapter 6 adds new content only — no retroactive editing. However, no checksum verification of the snapshot is demonstrated. Immutability is respected in practice but not cryptographically verified.

7_pre_writing_report_completeness.rationale: All required sections present: breakpoint identification (chapter 5, '夜袭', with snapshot creation time), current intent (arc trajectory), current focus (P0/P1/P2 priorities), reconstructed state table (5 categories with detailed status), style fingerprint review (sentence length, TTR, rhetoric, punctuation markers), drift detection (4 dimensions with detailed per-dimension assessment), human confirmation items (4 items with test-mode markers), and simulated confirmation checklist (6 items in dedicated table). Well-structured and complete.

notes: Strong improvement over prior round. The test-mode human confirmation markers ([测试模式-模拟确认]) are correctly and consistently applied — a clean separation from real [x] confirmations. The chapter 6 output shows strong continuity: emotional清算 for 老李头's death, father plotline introduction, 酸饼人情链 theme, consistent 灵能守恒 physics, and explicit arc confirmation ('他不是第1章那个人了'). Self-check (POST_WRITE_SELF_CHECK) is thorough across 9 dimensions. Main deduction: drift detection is qualitative rather than quantitative. Otherwise solid execution of all 4 pre-writing steps and the writing pipeline.
